auth.emailVerifiedSuccess: Your email has been verified! You can now sign in.

videoPlayer.downloadMp4: Download MP4 (original file — not the streaming playlist)

credits.title: Buy Credits
credits.blikInstructions: Open your banking app, generate a BLIK code, and enter it below. We will verify the payment manually.
credits.blikExpiredNewCode: Code expired? Enter a new BLIK code:
credits.sendExactAmount: Send exactly {amount} to the address below
credits.enterTxId: Enter your Transaction ID after sending
credits.pendingManualVerification: We verify payments manually — thank you for your patience.
credits.paypalInstructions: Send the payment to the PayPal address below and include your payment code in the transfer note.
credits.revolutInstructions: Send the payment to the Revolut account below and include your payment code in the transfer note.
credits.creditsAdded: {credits} credits have been added to your balance.
credits.paymentRejectedMessage: Your payment was not approved. Please try again or contact support.
credits.fileFormats: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, PDF - Max 10 MB
credits.proofSpeedsUpPurchase: Adding payment proof will significantly speed up the purchase process.
credits.createPurchaseFailed: Failed to create purchase. Please try again.
credits.uploadProofFailed: Failed to upload payment proof. Please try again.
credits.updateBlikFailed: Failed to update BLIK code. Please try again.
credits.blikMaxRetriesReached: Maximum BLIK code attempts reached. Please start a new purchase.
credits.blikRetriesRemaining: {count, plural, one {# attempt remaining} other {# attempts remaining}}
credits.referralPromptDesc: Share your referral link — when someone signs up and buys credits, you both get rewards.
credits.publicSubtitle: Current packages and prices are listed below. Sign in or create an account to buy credits and unlock content.
credits.publicNoPackages: No packages available right now — please check back later.

referral.title: Referral Program
referral.description: Share your link and earn credits when friends sign up and make their first purchase.
referral.shareLink: Share this link with friends. When they register and buy credits, you both earn rewards.
referral.howItWorksDesc: When someone registers with your link and makes their first credit purchase, you receive credits and they get a bonus.
referral.howItWorksDescWithBonuses: When someone registers with your link and makes their first credit purchase, you receive {creditsReferrer} credits, and they get a {bonusPercentReferee}% bonus on the credits they buy.
referral.nudgePeriodicDesc: Share your link — you get rewards when friends register and make their first purchase.
referral.modalBody: You get {creditsReferrer} credits when they make their first purchase; they get a {bonusPercentReferee}% bonus on credits. Copy your link below.
referral.loadError: Could not load referral data. Check your connection and try again.
referral.legacyLinkDesc: Some email clients or ad platforms work better with this format. Clicks may not be tracked the same way as the main link.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.autoplayDesc: Automatically start playing videos when you open them
dashboard.oauthEmailNote: Your account uses Discord login. Email changes are not available for OAuth accounts.
dashboard.oauthPasswordNote: Your account uses Discord login. Password changes are not available for OAuth accounts.
dashboard.passwordRequirements: Min. 8 characters, at least one uppercase, one lowercase, and one number.

admin.title: Admin Panel

payments.browserNotifyHint: Get system notifications while this tab is open — allow browser notifications.
payments.chartBrushHint: Drag on the chart to narrow the date range

admin.customLinksDesc: Manage custom tracking links and redirects
admin.contentInsightsDesc: Grid opens = click from the model folder. Full views = any full-screen content open (overlay, /content/…, favorites). Watch time uses cumulative seconds (tab hide + minute heartbeats). Download source MP4 when stored on R2 — marketing only with proper rights.
admin.contentInsightsSortHintBar: Click a column header to switch ascending / descending. After choosing a column, use “Combined ranking” to restore the default weighted score (watch time + opens).
admin.contentInsightsEmpty: No activity in this period yet (or events still collecting).
admin.contentInsightsFootnote: Grid opens = logged-in users with access. Watch time is summed per session end (leaving the player). R2 may hold HLS segments without a separate MP4 — ZIP export can still use a thumbnail or a file under the HLS folder.
admin.dashboardHomeSubtitle: Switch between business snapshot and content engagement. Export top materials for marketing when rights allow.
admin.contentInsightsShellSubtitle: Content engagement and catalog performance — export for marketing while respecting rights.
admin.catalogInsightsDesc: Home and featured cards: raw vs. engaged impressions (~0.9s in viewport), profile opens, CTR, and on the profile page — average time, sessions, and “deep” visits (≥20s or ≥25% scroll). The segment filter applies only to catalog events; profile metrics are global.
admin.catalogInsightsSortHint: Sort by column. CTR = opens ÷ raw impressions. CTR ÷ engaged = opens ÷ engaged impressions (can exceed 100% if users click before the card reaches the engaged threshold). Combined weights opens, login-wall clicks, and impressions slightly.
admin.catalogInsightsEmpty: No catalog events in this period yet — traffic will appear after users browse the model directory.
admin.catalogInsightsColEngagedHint: Card visible in the viewport for ~0.9s (counted separately from raw impressions).
admin.catalogInsightsColCtrEngagedHint: Profile opens ÷ engaged impressions (a click may happen without the card reaching the dwell threshold).
admin.catalogInsightsColAvgTimeHint: Average time on the model profile page (final beacon on tab hide / navigation).
admin.catalogInsightsColDeepHint: Profile sessions with ≥20s on page or ≥25% page scroll.
admin.catalogInsightsFootnote: Raw impression: first time the card crosses the visibility threshold (once per tab). Engaged: ~0.9s continuous visibility. Profile session: one summary per visit (time, scroll, favorites/content flags). Admin accounts excluded from aggregates.
admin.dashboardOverviewLead: Quick snapshot — open full analytics for charts and breakdowns.
admin.dashboardZipHint: ZIP: source MP4 when present, thumbnails or the first available file under the HLS folder (e.g. thumbnail), photos via thumbnail path. Max 40 items per request.
admin.dashboardNoExportable: No rows have an export path in the database (source MP4, thumbnail, or HLS folder). Deploy the latest API or fix content_items fields.
admin.observabilityDbBackupHint: Latest daily dump on the API host (symlink from postgres-backup-local).
admin.observabilityDbBackupNotConfigured: Backup path not configured (set POSTGRES_BACKUP_DIR on the API, e.g. mount the backup volume in Docker).
admin.observabilityDbBackupNone: No daily backup file found yet.
admin.observabilityDwhHint: Rows include fingerprint, kind, browser, release, and JSON context for warehouse sync (e.g. Fivetran, Airbyte, or COPY to BigQuery).
admin.observabilityClearLogsConfirm: Delete all stored client error logs? This cannot be undone.
admin.growthEventsHint: First-party funnel events from POST /api/growth-hacker. Admin accounts excluded.
admin.growthFunnelUserHoverHint: Click the ID to open the user in the admin panel.
admin.growthFunnelUserJourneyFootnote: Distinct users with user_id on both events. Order: first signup_completed, then email_verified, then checkout_started, then purchase_completed (each step is the first occurrence in the window; the next must be at or after that time). Anonymous sessions (no user_id) are not included.
admin.growthFunnelUserJourneyConversion: Share of users who reached the next step
admin.growthFunnelUserJourneySpread: Band = p25–p75 elapsed time; marker = median
admin.growthFunnelUserJourneyTapDrill: Filter live events by the target step
admin.growthFunnelDrillHint: Click a metric tile or event label to narrow the list below. Click a user ID to open their profile in Users.
admin.creditsAmountLabel: Amount (positive to add, negative to remove)
admin.promoMinPackagePrice: Min. package price (same currency as packages, e.g. PLN). 0 = no minimum.
admin.promoDeleteConfirm: Delete this promo code? This cannot be undone.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.noFavoritesDesc: Heart content you love to find it here later.

popup.signInFirst: Create an account or sign in to view this content.
popup.unlockModel: Choose an access plan for this model.
popup.bundleDescription: Get access to every creator and future content.
popup.insufficientCredits: Not enough credits for this. Add more or pick a cheaper option.

cookieBanner.title: Cookie consent
cookieBanner.message: We use cookies for authentication and preferences. By continuing, you agree to our use of cookies.

onboarding.postAuthBody: Browse creators, buy credits when you're ready, and use the menu for dashboard, purchases, and favorites.
onboarding.tourStep1Body: Explore the catalog — open a creator to see content and access options.
onboarding.tourStep2Body: Credits unlock time-limited access. Tap here when you want to top up.
onboarding.tourStep3Body: Pick a package and pay with BLIK, crypto, or other available methods.
onboarding.tourStep4Body: Dashboard, purchases, favorites, and referrals are here.
onboarding.guestTourStep1Body: Use “Creators” in the header to return here anytime and explore the catalog.
onboarding.guestTourStep2Body: Type a name to filter the grid and find a creator faster.
onboarding.guestTourStep3Body: Tap a country to narrow the list, or stay on “All” to see everyone.
onboarding.guestTourStep4Body: “Buy credits” shows current packages and prices — see what access costs before you create an account.
onboarding.guestTourStep5Body: Create an account to purchase credits, unlock content, and manage purchases from your dashboard.
